summary: Completed testing of Projections page system-wide logic and campaign launch bug fix. All 7 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test campaign with TEST_ prefix was created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projections page and campaign launch features are working correctly. The GET /api/projections/system endpoint returns total_leads, pipeline_stages, active_campaigns, active_enrollments, funded_count. The GET /api/campaigns/enhanced endpoint no longer returns 500 error - the bug was fixed by adding all required fields (updated_at, triggers, stop_on_reply, target_tags, contacts_enrolled) to the launch_prebuilt_campaign function. Launched campaigns now show as 'active' status on the Drip Campaigns page.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/projections/system: PASS - Returns total_leads (10), pipeline_stages, active_campaigns (1), active_enrollments (1), funded_count (3)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/campaigns/enhanced: PASS - Returns campaigns list without 500 error, all campaigns have updated_at field
backend_api_tests.GET /api/campaigns/prebuilt: PASS - Returns 4 prebuilt campaigns (new_lead, funded_short, funded_medium, funded_long)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/campaigns/prebuilt/funded_shor: PASS - Launches campaign with active status, returns campaign_id and enrolled_count
backend_api_tests.Campaign status verification: PASS - Launched campaigns show as 'active' in campaigns list
backend_api_tests.Projections formula verification: PASS - Cost per lead is $0.45 (54 msgs x $0.0083)

frontend_ui_tests.Earning Projections panel: PASS - Dark-themed panel with 'Based on 10 total leads in your system'
frontend_ui_tests.KPI Est. Conversions card: PASS - Shows '0 to 1' with '1% - 12% conversion rate'
frontend_ui_tests.KPI Projected Revenue card: PASS - Shows '$0 to $600' with '$50 - $600 per converted lead'
frontend_ui_tests.KPI Net Profit card: PASS - Shows '$0 to $600' with 'After messaging costs'
frontend_ui_tests.Pipeline Summary section: PASS - Shows all pipeline stages with counts
frontend_ui_tests.Campaign Activity section: PASS - Shows 1 active campaign, 1 lead in campaigns, 10% coverage
frontend_ui_tests.Formula footnote: PASS - Shows 'Revenue = Conversions (1%-12%) x Net Profit ($50-$600/lead) — Text Cost ($0.0083/msg x 54 msgs)'
frontend_ui_tests.Deals stats row: PASS - Shows Projected Volume, Active Deals, Outstanding, Collected, Late Accounts, Avg Deal Size
frontend_ui_tests.Drip Campaigns page: PASS - Shows 'New Lead Follow-Up' campaign with 'active' status badge
frontend_ui_tests.Bulk Templated Campaign dialog: PASS - Shows all 4 campaign templates with client match counts

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - Campaign messages are stored but not sent

bugs_verified_fixed.500_error_on_campaigns_enhanced: FIXED - The GET /api/campaigns/enhanced endpoint no longer returns 500 error. The bug was caused by missing updated_at field in launched prebuilt campaigns. Fixed by adding all required fields in launch_prebuilt_campaign function.
bugs_verified_fixed.launched_campaigns_not_showing_active: FIXED - Launched bulk campaigns now show as 'active' status on the Drip Campaigns page
